description: A portrait-format graphic with a muted, faded color treatment. The background photograph shows a tall slatted steel border fence running along a hillside above a distant town under a hazy sky. Large stacked serif text reads ZERO ILLEGAL ALIENS RELEASED AT THE BORDER, with an italic line below reading for the 11th straight month. A small circular Department of Homeland Security seal sits centered beneath the text.
notable_text: ZERO ILLEGAL ALIENS RELEASED AT THE BORDER for the 11th straight month
